summary: Iteration 15 testing: TTS (Text-to-Speech) in Bible page and Private Messages in Community. Backend 10/10 tests PASSED. Frontend features verified via code review and partial UI testing.

integration_issues.issue: Intermittent 520 server errors when loading Community page, which may prevent online users section from displaying

action_items: Verify TTS button visually by navigating to Bible > Select Book > Select Chapter (TTS appears only in reading view)
Investigate intermittent 520 errors affecting Community page loading
critical_code_review_comments: TTS implementation in bible.tsx (lines 24-164) is robust with Web Speech API + expo-speech fallback, Chrome bug fixes, and proper voice selection for all 6 languages
Private Messages modal in community.tsx (lines 434-524) properly implemented with send/receive functionality
Online users section renders conditionally when onlineUsers.length > 0 - may not appear if API returns empty/error
TTS button correctly shows volume-high/stop icon in header only during 'reading' view (line 1294-1302)

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Features implemented correctly, intermittent 520 errors may affect visibility

seed_data_creation: Created secondary test user for private message testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 features verified. TTS in Bible page works when in reading view (after selecting book+chapter). Private messages API working (POST /api/messages, GET /api/messages/{user_id}). Online users section should show at top of Community page when users are online. Check browser console for TTS logs prefixed with 'TTS:'

tts_languages_api.details: All 6 languages (it, es, en, pt, fr, de) have correct tts_code for TTS functionality

private_messages_send.details: POST /api/messages correctly creates private message, returns message_id, sender_id, receiver_id

private_messages_retrieve.details: GET /api/messages/{user_id} returns conversation with specific user, marks messages as read

private_messages_auth.details: All private message endpoints correctly require authentication (401 without token)

online_users_api.details: GET /api/community/online-users returns online_count and users array

bible_chapter_data.details: Bible chapters return readable text content for TTS in Italian, Spanish, and English

tts_frontend_code.details: speakText function (lines 24-164) implements Web Speech API with Chrome fixes and voice selection

tts_button_ui.details: TTS button (volume-high icon) shows in Bible header during reading view (lines 1294-1302)

private_chat_modal.details: Modal implemented in community.tsx (lines 434-524) with send message and conversation display

online_users_section.details: Online users section (lines 306-338) shows users with green indicator and chat icons
